zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Pyce於大約1608年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾時，她的父親Jerome Pyce Pease25歲，母親Alice Glover Stephens22歲。她於1636年與William Wardell在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼波斯頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1657年在美國麻薩諸塞州約克威爾斯享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Pyce于大约1608年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾时，她的父亲Jerome Pyce Pease25岁，母亲Alice Glover Stephens22岁。她于1636年与William Wardell在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼波斯頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1657年在美国马萨诸塞州約克威爾斯享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pyce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Pine  . This name has been established in Ireland since the 16th century.

variants.name: Pine
meanings: English: from Middle English pin(e) (Old English pīn, Old French pin), a topographic name for someone who lived by a conspicuous pine tree or in a pine forest; in some cases it may originally have been a nickname for a tall man, one thought to resemble a pine tree.
English: nickname from Middle English pine ‘pain, injury, torture, punishment, infirmity’, referring to someone who suffered from an inflicted pain or punishment.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Le Pin in Calvados or some other French place called from a prominent pine.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Pyce was born about 1608, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Jerome Pyce Pease, was 25 and her mother, Alice Glover Stephens, was 22. She married William Wardell in 1636, in Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1657, in Wells, York, Massachusetts, United States, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Pyce est née environ 1608, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Jerome Pyce Pease, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Alice Glover Stephens, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé William Wardell en 1636, à Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1657, à Wells, York, Massachusetts, États-Unis, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Pyce um 1608 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jerome Pyce Pease 25 und ihre Mutter Alice Glover Stephens 22. Sie hat 1636 in Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America William Wardell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1657 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Wells, York, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Pyce è nata il circa 1608 nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Jerome Pyce Pease, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Alice Glover Stephens, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato William Wardell nel 1636, nel Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1657, nel Wells, York, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Pyceが約1608年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Jerome Pyce Peaseは25歳，母Alice Glover Stephensは22歳であった。1636年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーボストンでWilliam Wardellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1657年にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ヨークウエルズで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Pyce(이)가 대략 1608년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jerome Pyce Pease(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Glover Stephens(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1636년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 보스턴에서 William Wardell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1657년 미국 매사추세츠 주 요르크 웰스에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Pyce nasceu aproximadamente 1608, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Jerome Pyce Pease, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Alice Glover Stephens, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com William Wardell em 1636, em Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1657, em Wells, York, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Pyce родилась около 1608 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Jerome Pyce Pease было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Glover Stephens, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Wardell в 1636 г. в местности бостон, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1657 г. в местности веллс, ерк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Pyce nació aproximadamente 1608, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Jerome Pyce Pease, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Alice Glover Stephens, tenía 22 años. Se casó con William Wardell en 1636, en Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1657, en Wells, York, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 50 años.
